feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Process Orchestration
feed.subtitle: SAP Process Orchestration Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP NWBPM calling parameterized mapping from ESR
entry.content:
Hi folks,

I have imported a parameterized interface mapping from ESR into NWBPM (7.5 SP25) and I am calling it inside an automated activity. However I can't find a way to pass a value to the parameter. On the Input mapping tab I can fill the input structure fine but no option for the parameter. Please point me in the right direction!

Thanks

entry.title: IDOC structure not displaying in Xpath condition editor
entry.content:
IDOC structure is not displaying in Xpath condition editor for only 1 Idoc and only in production environment when we want to add a condition on the receiver interface tab. This was working before because there were conditions  set on the receiver itself. However if we want to add a new condition there it also does not show the Idoc structure in the xpath editor on the receiver tab.

The  Idoc is visible in the Business System in the Sender tab and the SWCV is visible in the tab Other Attributes.

The Idoc version is the same as in development and quality where this problem does not occur. SLD cache has been refreshed many times, without any effect. CPA cache only delta because this is in production.

I have read the different questions and answers on this forum for the same problem. Unfortunately those solutions did not help

Solved: IDOC structure not displaying in Xpath condition e... - SAP Community

Solved: IDoc Message Structure Missing from Condition Edit... - SAP Community

Solved: Idoc structure not displying in XPATH at Receiver ... - SAP Community

I have two questions:

1. Does anyone have another idea what this could be and how to fix it ? Would a restart solve it ?

2.  If we add the condition for the receiver interface manually will it work ? I see contradictionary statements about this manually adding conditions.

Any suggestion is welcome. It is a change for production so it is kind of urgent. Thanks.

Regards,

Peter

entry.title: message in sxi_monitor in ECC status log version but in PI is sucessfully
entry.content:
Dear expert

I am facing a strange issue in my synchronous scenario: ECC(proxy)->PI->BPM(soap). 

 Some of the messages for this scenario are stuck in sxi_monitor with status "Log Version" (grey circle sign). Inside sxi_monitor traces, there is no response. but I can see everything has processed successfully in PI and already responded to the message to ECC.

I suspected it was because the parameter timeout in PI was too short. So I set a timeout of 5 minutes in channel.But this situation still happens. From the PI log, the message is responded  within 1 minute.

Please help how should i proceed. I have already spent half a day searching over SDN and other sites....

Thanks very much.

 

##SAP Process Orchestration #SAP S

entry.title: Manuals SAP PI PO Cloud Integration Data Services
entry.content:
hi,

where can I find manuals to get started on sap PI / PO, sap cloud integration and sap data services?


I would need manuals such as which explains what it is: Enterprise Services Repository


Thank you

entry.title: SyncAsyncBridge not getting the response in PRD ... DEV is working
entry.content:
Hi 

I have a syncAsync bridge scenario set up in SAP PO. That's working fine in DEV. Now I moved to PRD and there the bridge is not working.

The WaitingResponseBean is not receiving any messages with the correlationId that it is waiting for.

Is there a way to monitor this (besides the audit log in monitoring?>? 

Do specific services need to run?

 

Ron

entry.title: PI/PO To CPI Migration
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We are planning for PI/PO to CPI migration. We also have our S/4 Rise migration planned. So I would like to know if we should plan the PI/PO to CPI migration after the S/4 Rise migration or if we can start the PI/PO to CPI migration before that. What could be the pros and cons of doing the PI/PO to CPI migration before the S/4 Rise migration?

 

SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration SAP Process Integration SAP Process Orchestration RISE with SAP 


Thanks and Regards
Sachin Kumar Singh

entry.title: Rest Sender - No channel found to handle "GET" request
entry.content:
Hi

Have an issue with rest sender and passing parameter: 

This setup works okay: 

When calling from Postman RESTAdapter/api/TOCtechloc/TechLocationInformation/id/IF12345
ID gets passed trough allright. 
But i would like to enable "normal" rest parameter call:
RESTAdapter/api/TOCtechloc/TechLocationInformation?id=IF12345

Then i get error:

No channel found to handle "GET" request to "/api/TOCtechloc/TechLocationInformation"

Any ideas of what i am doing wrong?

entry.title: Errors in SAP Backend SXMB_MONI
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have outbound interfaces from SAP ECC to partner systems via SAP PO and we are from SAP PO side.

Could you please help us to identify the root cause of the issue and to avoid this issue in future?

Please find below screenshot that shows the error in SXMB_MONI and is there something that can be done on SAP PO side. If not who can help us to resolve the issue and also ensure that these messages in SXMB_MONI wont occur again in future? Thank you!

Regards,

Ramu.

entry.title: SXI_MONITOR: filter in SXMS_LMS_CONF - look up all not empty values
entry.content:
Hi.

I'm investigating possibilities look up all messages via SXI_MONITOR where certain node has a value

I've tried to create a filter in SXMS_LMS_CONF with

[string-length(text()) > 0]

in the end of my XPath statement, but it cause error during test run.

If there any option for this?

ECC6, NW750

entry.title: Migration of BPM application to cloud
entry.content: We are migrating from S/4 Hana on prem 1909 to S/4 Hana on cloud under Rise with SAP offering. We have developed a number of applications developed on BPM. How can we migrate to cloud without redeveloping the extensive list of BPMs .

entry.title: Can we use SAP PI/PO system and SAP Solution Manager in SAP RISE
entry.content:
Background: Planning a migration to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition (Rise) and concerned about the future of certain tools that we are currently using:

Questions 1) Currently have SAP Solution Manager 7.2 in SQL Server 2012 on premise and  would like to know if it is worth planning some type of SQL Server upgrade for this project or is there any other tool that will replace the functionality of the Solution Manager in SAP Rise ?

Question 2) Having 2 PI servers (Process Integrator 7.5) in SQL Server 2012 on premise that act as middleware between the ERP and (SAP SuccessFactors or SAP Concur), and want to know the same way in this conversion process / migration to SAP Rise, how would this component function in the new Rise architecture, will it be replaced by which tool?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Issue while connecting single S4 SAP system with 2 different PI/PO systems
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to process BP master data (example :BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_Out) from S4 system to multiple PI/PO systems.

we have configured RFC destinations, sxmb_admin parameters as per first solution provided in blog  https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/proxy-for-multiple-esrs/ba-p/13332250

IE Config: (Proxy settings at S4)

Category

parameters

subparameter

Current value

Default value

runtime

Is_url

 

dest://PI1_ADVANCE_ADAPTER_ENGINE

 

runtime

Is_url

PISYSTEM2

dest://PI2_ADVANCE_ADAPTER_ENGINE

 

The S4 system will trigger the standard service 'BusinessPartnerSUITEBulkReplicateRequest_Out'. and in both PI/PO systems, we are using standard XICONTENT and configured ICO as passthrough. (no mapping and no ESR). 

The issue we're facing is that when we trigger data from the ECC system, it always processes to PI system 1 only. i.e. default destination configured at sxmb_admin -->IE config. eventhough we configured runtime parameter IS_URL for second PI/PO system.

So the question is:  when S4 trigger BP data, given that the name space will be same, how does S4 differentiate to which PI system it should send data to?  the IS_URL configured for both PI /PO system 1 and 2 and for system2 the subparameter config done at sender/receiver id however it still shows same namespace.

is there anything we need to change at proxy code level? for the abap class 'CL_XMS_PLSRV_IE_ADAPTER-ENTER'? or any changes at PI/PO ICO side? please advise.

entry.title: Fetch the data between dates using select query in JDBC receiver
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

My requirement is REST to JDBC synchronous scenario using select query statement I need to pull data from database and send response back to REST API.

I have gone through the below article 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-pi-proxy-to-jdbc-scenario/ba-p/13326556

I am able to receive the response using the select statement in receiver JDBC. However, I need to select the data in certain period like 10 minutes using specific date field. 

Like if I give 02-07-2024 10:00:00 as input date for Select SQL statement then it should fetch data for next 10 minutes using the same date field which is 

Data between 02-07-2024 10:00:00 to 02-07-2024 10:10:00 

Please help.

entry.title: Download large file using REST adapter in SAP PO 7.5
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have requirement to download a large file ( > 2GB) using REST URL.

The actual message flow is like we need to fetch the file having username/password from AL11 and call the REST URL to download the file(.tar file).

I have tried to use the async - sync config, fetching the file from AL11 and calling the Rest URL and trying to save the downloaded file using File receiver channel(used in File sender channel Module) but the message is getting failed due to large file size.

 

Is it possible to use chunk mode or using unix script?

Kindly suggest how to achieve this requirement using SAP PO. 

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati

entry.title: Connect PO7.5 to Integration Suite?
entry.content:
Hi,

At my customer side we currently have multiple interfaces like ECC backend <=> SAP PO <=> 3rd party
Customer will switch part of the operation to S4HANA and also wants to move from SAP PO to Integration Suite on BTP.

But some of 3rd party connections are really quite complicated and might even be changed in 1 to 2 years, so i feel like the effort to move all of that to IS now, and then still change it later on is not worth the effort.

So what i'm thinking about is a split in some interfaces where we start using IS and PO together.
That will look like S4 <=> IS <=> PO <=> 3rd party.

This way i,
1) only connect S4 to IS (and not also to PO)
2) dont have to worry about the complicated stuff that is between PO and 3rd party
3) take up the work of connecting IS to 3rd party when the time has come for that change they will make

Of course it requires me copy all ICO's on PO to not have ECC as sender (mostly idocs by the way) but have Integration Suite as sender.
So that is some extra work.

Any thoughts on this way of working?
Can i just create HTTP connections between PO and IS to accomplish this scenario?

Any comments are appreciated

Kr

Robert

entry.title: How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log)
entry.content:
With the solution of KBA 3277360 it is possible to find top level work item ID. But the solution is on single work item basis. 

How to check the top level work item ID in mass (without accessing the details of the workflow log). 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP PI Java Migration to PO
entry.content:
Currently We have SAP PI Java Server we need to migrate to PO want to know just upgrading the server to latest SP level help or i have to build new Pralled landscape as their is no ABAP system for this 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Can we clean up objects SAP PI box in bulk.
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We have one new dev box created  as the copy of existing DEV box . Now we want to delete the not required integration from the new dev box. Do we have any job or any way that we can bulk delete the objects(iflows etc) rather than deleting one by one.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP PO : Multipart/form-data error when sending attachment through REST receiver adapter
entry.content:
I have a requirement to send a multipart/form-data body payload through REST receiver adapter. This is the POSTMAN HTTP source code that is successfully sent.

 

I have set my REST receiver CC as below.

and have successfully used java mapping to construct the payload in below format.

However, i receiver error in the REST receiver adapter.

Please help me what configuration am i still missing.

entry.title: How to give filename dynamically in file sender channel
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement to call the REST API to get the file name in response payload and use that particular filename in file sender channel to poll the file from SFTP server and place it in S4.

Kindly suggest how we can give the file name dynamically.

 

Thanks & Regards,

Niyati
